title: NexusOS Multi-Agent Coordination Protocol
summary: Defines the multi-agent development protocol for NexusOS. Covers: agent roles (Coordinator, Kernel, GUI, Driver, App, Overhaul), file ownership boundaries (protected files like kernel.c/hal/mm vs freely modifiable driver/gui/userspace dirs), extension points for adding drivers (driver_t interface), filesystems (vfs_ops_t), shell commands (command table), GUI (weak symbols), userspace programs, and syscalls. Includes knowledge item management rules (read=any, write=user permission), coding standards (gnu11, snake_case, 4-space indent, packed structs, volatile MMIO), build/test protocol, and major overhaul workflow. Version tracking: kernel 0.1.0 Genesis, Phase 2 complete.

references.title: Building A Custom X64 OS - Architecture Planning
